-0.0302*sin(0.195*x_6 + 0.1282*exp(1.5916*x_3) + 0.339*sin(0.8341*x_1 + 5.1797) - 1.0309*sin(1.2726*x_2 - 8.2365) - 0.8117*sin(1.7218*x_4 - 5.2702) - 1.0284*sin(1.4112*x_5 + 1.2042) + 4.4379) - 0.0202
